figures_detected.description: Valve oil seal removal using tools KV10109210 and KV10109220 on cylinder head with valve springs visible
Valve oil seal installation using tool KV10107902 on cylinder head
Cross-section diagram showing oil seal installation direction with engine inside/outside orientation, oil seal lip and dust seal lip labeled
Camshaft oil seal removal using a suitable tool being pulled out from camshaft bracket

steps.text: Remove timing belt and rocker cover.
Remove camshaft sprocket and camshaft hub.
Remove camshaft brackets by loosening bracket nuts from center to outside in two or three stages.
Remove camshaft oil seal and camshaft.
Remove valve lifters and mark order No. on each lifter.
Replace valve oil seal according to the following procedure.
warnings: When replacing valve oil seal, set the corresponding piston at TDC. Failure to do so causes the valve to drop into the cylinder.

steps.text: Remove valve springs and valve oil seals for No. 1 and No. 4 cylinders. Valve spring seats should not be removed.
Install new valve oil seals for No. 1 and No. 4 cylinders using a suitable tool. Re-install valve springs. Install valve spring retainers and remount valve assembly.
Replace valve oil seals for No. 2 and No. 3 cylinders according to steps 2) and 3).
Install valve lifters in original positions.

content_blocks.text: When installing camshaft and crankshaft oil seals, be careful to install them correctly, as shown in the figure.
Apply engine oil to oil seal lip, outer face, camshaft and bracket.
Wipe off excess oil after installing oil seal.

content_blocks.description: Oil seal cross-section showing correct installation orientation with engine inside and engine outside directions indicated

steps.text: Remove timing belt, sprocket and hub.
Pull out oil seal with a suitable tool.

tools_referenced.name: Valve oil seal removal tool
tools_referenced.usage: Remove valve oil seals from cylinder head

tools_referenced.name: Valve oil seal removal tool (companion)
tools_referenced.usage: Remove valve oil seals from cylinder head

tools_referenced.name: Valve oil seal installer
tools_referenced.usage: Install new valve oil seals for No. 1, No. 2, No. 3 and No. 4 cylinders
